verdict.summary: diagnostic_updater reports stale status because the hardware driver stopped publishing diagnostics within the expected period.

dead_ends.action: Increase the stale timeout to hide the warning
dead_ends.why_fails: Stale diagnostics usually mean the hardware is actually not responding; hiding delays fault detection

dead_ends.action: Remove the diagnostic from the aggregator config
dead_ends.why_fails: Loses monitoring capability for that hardware component

workarounds.action: Check if the hardware driver node is still running
workarounds.how: ros2 node list | grep driver_node && ros2 topic hz /diagnostics

workarounds.action: Verify diagnostic_updater frequency matches the driver's publication rate
workarounds.how: Set diagnostic_updater period to match or slightly exceed the driver rate

workarounds.action: Add a hardware watchdog that restarts the driver on failure
